case.title: 供应商审核订单通过
case.description: 完整链路：登录供应商端→从侧边工作栏点击订单管理-订单列表→进入订单列表页→在订单编号处输入订单号→点击查询→点击订单号进入订单详情页→点击审核通过→弹出提示弹框→点击核对无误→完成审单。

scenario.title: 从侧边栏进入订单管理-订单列表

test_step.data: ((async () => { const sleep = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const visible = el => !!el && el.isConnected && !!(el.offsetWidth || el.offsetHeight || el.getClientRects().length); const norm = s => String(s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const getSidebar = () => document.querySelector('.el-aside, [class*=sidebar], [class*=side-bar], .el-menu--vertical, [class*=leftMenu], [class*=left-menu], .el-menu'); const sb = getSidebar(); if (sb) { sb.scrollTop = sb.scrollHeight; await sleep(500); } for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) { if (i % 10 === 0) { const s = getSidebar(); if (s) s.scrollBy(0, 200); await sleep(300); } const titles = [...document.querySelectorAll('.el-submenu__title, .el-menu-item, li, a, span, div')].filter(visible); const title = titles.find(el => { const own = norm([...el.childNodes].filter(n => n.nodeType === 3).map(n => n.textContent).join('')); return own === '订单管理'; }); if (title) { title.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); await sleep(300); title.click(); await sleep(2000); break; } await sleep(500); } for (let i = 0; i < 40; i++) { const items = [...document.querySelectorAll('.el-menu-item, li, a, span')].filter(visible); const orderList = items.find(el => { const own = norm([...el.childNodes].filter(n => n.nodeType === 3).map(n => n.textContent).join('')); const t = norm(el.textContent || ''); return own === '订单列表' || (t === '订单列表' && el.children.length === 0); }); if (orderList) { orderList.click(); return 'navigated-to-order-list'; } await sleep(500); } const s = getSidebar(); throw new Error('订单列表二级菜单未找到, sidebar: ' + (s ? s.innerText : document.body.innerText).slice(0, 500)); })())

((async () => { const sleep = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const visible = el => !!el && el.isConnected && !!(el.offsetWidth || el.offsetHeight || el.getClientRects().length); const norm = s => String(s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const orderNo = 'S2604300001837'; const mainContent = document.querySelector('.el-main, [class*=main-content], [class*=app-main], main, .content-wrapper, #app .container') || document.body; for (let i = 0; i < 50; i++) { const labels = [...mainContent.querySelectorAll('label, .el-form-item__label, span, div, td, th')].filter(visible); const orderLabel = labels.find(el => { const t = norm(el.innerText || el.textContent || ''); return (t === '订单编号' || t === '订单编号：' || t === '订单编号:') && el.children.length <= 2; }); if (orderLabel) { const parent = orderLabel.closest('.el-form-item, .search-item, .filter-item, [class*=form-item], [class*=search], [class*=filter], tr, .el-row, .el-col') || orderLabel.parentElement; const input = parent ? parent.querySelector('input:not([type=hidden])') : null; if (!input) { const next = orderLabel.nextElementSibling; const inputInNext = next ? (next.tagName === 'INPUT' ? next : next.querySelector('input')) : null; if (inputInNext) { const nativeSet = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set; nativeSet.call(inputInNext, orderNo); inputInNext.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); inputInNext.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); await sleep(500); return 'order-no-entered-sibling'; } } else { const nativeSet = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set; nativeSet.call(input, orderNo); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); await sleep(500); return 'order-no-entered'; } } await sleep(500); } const allLabels = [...mainContent.querySelectorAll('label, .el-form-item__label, span')].filter(visible).map(el => norm(el.textContent || '')).filter(t => t.length < 20); throw new Error('订单编号输入框未找到, 主内容区labels: ' + JSON.stringify(allLabels.slice(0, 15))); })())

((async () => { const sleep = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const visible = el => !!el && el.isConnected && !!(el.offsetWidth || el.offsetHeight || el.getClientRects().length); const norm = s => String(s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const mainContent = document.querySelector('.el-main, [class*=main-content], [class*=app-main], main, .content-wrapper') || document.body; for (let i = 0; i < 20; i++) { const btns = [...mainContent.querySelectorAll('button, .el-button')].filter(visible); const searchBtn = btns.find(el => { const t = norm(el.innerText || el.textContent); return t === '查询' || t === '搜索'; }); if (searchBtn) { searchBtn.click(); return 'search-clicked'; } await sleep(500); } throw new Error('查询按钮未找到'); })())

scenario.title: 点击订单号进入订单详情页

test_step.data: ((async () => { const sleep = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const visible = el => !!el && el.isConnected && !!(el.offsetWidth || el.offsetHeight || el.getClientRects().length); const orderNo = 'S2604300001837'; for (let i = 0; i < 40; i++) { const links = [...document.querySelectorAll('a')].filter(visible); const orderLink = links.find(el => { const t = String(el.innerText || el.textContent || '').trim(); return t === orderNo || t.includes(orderNo); }); if (orderLink) { const href = orderLink.getAttribute('href') || orderLink.href || ''; orderLink.removeAttribute('target'); orderLink.click(); await sleep(500); if (window.location.href.includes('detail') || window.location.hash.includes('detail')) { return 'navigated-same-tab'; } if (href) { window.location.href = href; return 'navigated-via-href: ' + href; } return 'clicked'; } await sleep(500); } throw new Error('订单号链接未找到: ' + orderNo); })())

((async () => { const sleep = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const visible = el => !!el && el.isConnected && !!(el.offsetWidth || el.offsetHeight || el.getClientRects().length); const norm = s => String(s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) { const all = [...document.querySelectorAll('button, .el-button, span, a, div, input')].filter(visible); const approveBtn = all.find(el => { const t = norm(el.innerText || el.textContent || el.value || ''); return t === '审核通过' || t === '审核通过 '; }); if (approveBtn) { approveBtn.click(); return 'approve-clicked'; } if (i === 40) { const url = location.href; const pageText = (document.body.innerText || '').slice(0, 800); throw new Error('审核通过按钮未找到, url: ' + url + ', pageText: ' + pageText); } await sleep(500); } throw new Error('审核通过按钮未找到(超时)'); })())

scenario.title: 确认弹框点击核对无误完成审单

test_step.data: ((async () => { const sleep = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const visible = el => !!el && el.isConnected && !!(el.offsetWidth || el.offsetHeight || el.getClientRects().length); const norm = s => String(s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) { const btns = [...document.querySelectorAll('button, .el-button, span, a, div')].filter(visible); const confirmBtn = btns.find(el => { const t = norm(el.innerText || el.textContent); return t === '核对无误'; }); if (confirmBtn) { confirmBtn.click(); return 'confirm-clicked-核对无误'; } await sleep(500); } throw new Error('核对无误按钮未找到'); })())

scenario.title: 校验订单状态变为已确认

test_step.data: ((async () => { const sleep = ms => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms)); const visible = el => !!el && el.isConnected && !!(el.offsetWidth || el.offsetHeight || el.getClientRects().length); const norm = s => String(s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) { const all = [...document.querySelectorAll('span, div, td, p, label, em')].filter(visible); const statusEl = all.find(el => { const t = norm(el.innerText || el.textContent || ''); return t === '已确认' || t.includes('已确认'); }); if (statusEl) { return 'order-status-confirmed: 已确认'; } await sleep(500); } const pageText = (document.body.innerText || '').slice(0, 1000); throw new Error('订单状态未变为已确认, 页面内容: ' + pageText.slice(0, 500)); })())
